title: Cooling Operating Range
summary: Cooling operating range: indoor temperature 16~35°C DB, relative humidity below 90%, entering water temperature 13~40°C.
evidence_quote: 制冷运行范围：  室内温度 16～35℃ (干球)，相对湿度范围为 90%以下，机组进水温度 13～40℃。

title: Heating Operating Range
summary: Heating operating range: indoor temperature 16~30°C DB, relative humidity below 90%, entering water temperature 10~35°C.
evidence_quote: 制热运行范围：  室内温度 16～30℃ (干球) ，相对湿度范围为 90%以下，机组进水温度 10～35℃。

title: Power Supply Voltage Tolerance
summary: Power supply voltage must be within ±10% of rated voltage.
evidence_quote: 电源电压 额定电压的 ±10%以内

title: Power Supply Frequency Tolerance
summary: Power supply frequency must be within ±1% of rated frequency.
evidence_quote: 电源频率 额定频率的 ±1%以内

title: Phase Voltage Unbalance Limit
summary: Phase-to-phase voltage unbalance must be within ±2% of rated voltage.
evidence_quote: 各相之间不平衡  额定电压的 ±2%以内

title: Cooling Water Flow Range
summary: Cooling water flow must be 70%~130% of rated water flow.
evidence_quote: 冷却水的流量  70%~130% 额定水流量

title: Cooling Water Pressure Limit
summary: Cooling water pressure must be below 1.6 MPa (gauge).
evidence_quote: 冷却水的水压  1.6Mpa 以下（表压）

title: Relative Humidity Limit
summary: Relative humidity must be below 90%.

title: External Static Pressure Range
summary: External static pressure must be 80%~120% of rated external static pressure.
evidence_quote: 出风静压 80%~120% 额定出风静压

title: Air Filter Cleaning Frequency
summary: Clean air filter once per month using soft brush and neutral detergent below 40°C.

structured_payload.method: 用软毛刷、含有中性清洁剂且低于40℃的水来清除粘附在过滤网上的灰尘然后晾干

evidence_quote:
空气过滤网  1.打开进风格栅
2.将空气过滤网取出
3.用软毛刷、含有中性清洁剂且低于 40℃的水来清除粘附在过滤网上的灰尘然后晾干
4.晾干后，过滤网装回原位置
注意：不能使用汽油、脱水剂、苯类物质或其它化学物质作为清洁剂  1次/月

title: Condenser Cleaning Frequency
summary: Clean condenser once per year, depending on water quality.
evidence_quote:
冷凝器 清洗套管 1次/年(视冷
却水水质)

title: Fault Code F2
summary: Fault code F2 indicates system 1 coil temperature sensor fault.

structured_payload.description: 系统1盘管温度传感器故障

evidence_quote: F2 系统1盘管温度传感器故障

title: Fault Code L1
summary: Fault code L1 indicates system 1 low pressure fault.

title: Fault Code H1
summary: Fault code H1 indicates system 1 compressor overload.

title: Fault Code L4
summary: Fault code L4 indicates water flow switch open.

summary: Fault code H4 indicates system 1 high pressure fault.

summary: Fault code Fb indicates water level switch open.

summary: Fault code L3 indicates system water temperature too high or too low.
